data.body: CI FIX: change 903 (S4) got Verified-1 from the env-var registry drift gate (docs/env-vars.md stale). Root cause: gen_env_registry.py records the FILE each os.environ.get is read in; S4's apply_handlers.py edit shifted a non-literal env-read line (:55->:57), and S5's module moves changed acli_subprocess/outbound_fields paths. NOT REBAR_RECONCILER_BACKEND (generator only scans os.environ.get literals, so S3 was clean). Fix: regenerated docs/env-vars.md per-tree — amended S4' (377d85430, apply_handlers line shift) and S5' (a3b8b2c3b, module-move paths); regen at tip now clean. Change-Ids preserved -> updated patchsets on 903 & 905 (S1/S2/S3 unchanged, still green). CI re-running.
